div.h1: Stack Folding for Flame Graph Input
div.p: Aggregating individual samples into collapsed format

• Compression: 990 samples → ~50 unique paths (20× smaller)
• Human-readable: Can grep, sort, analyze with standard tools
• Tool-agnostic: Works with flamegraph.pl, speedscope, custom tools
• Lossless: All sample counts preserved, no information discarded

ul.li: Count: Number of times this exact path appeared
One line per unique path (not per sample)
